description:
Legal record (#11) in a court register/pinqas from a Rabbanite beit din in Cairo (on ff. 3v-4r of BL OR 6356). In Hebrew. Location: Cairo. Dated: 2 Adar 5443 AM, which is 1683 CE. 

(Document #11) Real estate transaction for an upper-story apartment in Cairo in which Hermoza, widow of Masʿūd Miṣrātī, sells ownership of the property to Raḥma bt. Moshe Ben-Ḥayyīm, wife of Shemuʾel ha-Kohen Bona. The apartment had previously been in the possession of Hermoza's mother Esther bt. ʿAmram אוזון (possibly the Turkish surname Üzün), widow of Khalīfa Suwaydān. As part of the sale procedure, Hermoza testifies before the court that her mother Esther left no other heirs at the time of her death. The cost of the apartment is 1,200 medin, which Raḥma paid with money from her dowry. MCD.
description_he: רשומה משפטית (#11) בפנקס בית דין רבני בקהיר (BL OR 6356, דפים 3v-4r); בעברית; ב' אדר ה'תמ"ג (1683 לספירה); עסקת נדל"ן שבה הֵרְמוֹזָה, אלמנת מסעוד מִצְרָאטִי, מוכרת דירת גג לרחמה בת משה בן-חיים אשת שמואל הכהן בּוֹנָה; עלות הדירה 1,200 מֶדין ששולמה מנדוניית הקונה
